article_meta.title: Legacy of Trauma: The Impact of American Indian Boarding Schools Across Generations Posted by Dr

reasoning: The summary avoids the article’s most loaded framing and hyperbolic language, uses generally neutral wording, and attributes content to the author. Minor phrasing like “inflicted” and “deliberate historical trauma” echoes the source’s stance slightly without explicit attribution, but overall the tone is measured and more neutral than the original.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses mostly neutral verbs; slight interpretive phrasing like “inflicted” appears but is limited.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Claims are grounded in the article’s accounts and cited policies; no new assertions added.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Mostly attributes views to the author; “deliberate historical trauma” edges toward the author’s framing but is minimal.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Avoids the article’s strongest hyperbole (“dungeons and death camps,” “best kept secret”).
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or ad hominem language.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not speculate on intentions beyond citing policy aims stated in law.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the single dominant perspective of the source while noting policy context and healing efforts.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures survivors’ perspective, historical policy context, and advocacy; omits no major viewpoint present in the source.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Limited use of evaluative adjectives; mostly descriptive and factual.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral vocabulary; no ideologically loaded terms introduced.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Acknowledges harms but also includes healing and legislative efforts, matching source balance.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats survivor accounts, historical records, and advocacy similarly.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Noticeably more neutral than source’s rhetoric while conveying key points.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes all distinct perspectives present (survivors, legislative record, advocacy/healing initiatives).
